query:
SELECT id, buyerName, propertyAddress, propertyReference, saleDate, expectedPaymentDate, totalCommission, commissionPaymentDate, createdAt 
FROM sales 
WHERE saleDate >= '2025-01-01' AND saleDate < '2025-02-01'
ORDER BY saleDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
